reply.findTool: Aquí tienes herramientas que coinciden con lo que describes:
reply.explainTool: Esta herramienta convierte las entradas de tu trabajo en un veredicto claro con los factores de riesgo que lo sustentan:
reply.inputs: Introduces los costes, cantidades y tarifas esenciales de tu trabajo. Los campos obligatorios se mantienen al mínimo y los opcionales afinan el resultado.
reply.results: El resultado es un veredicto con las métricas y los factores de riesgo que lo sustentan, para ver por qué queda donde queda y qué ajustar.
reply.approvedReports: Los resultados premium pueden guardarse como resúmenes de decisión exportables para revisión interna del equipo.
reply.trustTrace: El Resumen del cálculo registra entradas, supuestos y pasos de validación para mostrar cómo se produjo el resultado.
reply.regionalUnits: SectorCalc admite unidades métricas, imperiales y regionales, y muestra las conversiones que utilizó.
reply.benchmarks: SectorCalc muestra un contexto de referencia regional indicativo junto a tu resultado — para orientación, no son cifras oficiales.
reply.pricing: Puedes ver los planes y qué incluye cada uno en la página de precios:
reply.enterprise: Para uso en equipo, gobernanza de informes, paquetes y compras, consulta la página Enterprise:
reply.about: SectorCalc es una plataforma global de cálculo industrial y apoyo a la decisión que revela pérdidas ocultas y convierte el cálculo en decisiones fiables:
reply.blockedFormula: No puedo realizar cálculos ni compartir fórmulas. Abre la herramienta correspondiente y calculará el resultado por ti.
reply.blockedPrivate: No puedo acceder a datos privados, cuentas ni secretos, y no puedo saltarme ninguna restricción.
reply.fallback: Puedo ayudarte a encontrar la herramienta adecuada, entender entradas y resultados, y navegar por SectorCalc. Prueba una de estas:

premiumSeo.metaTitle: {tool} | Guía de precio, margen y riesgo | SectorCalc
premiumSeo.metaDescription: Cómo funciona {tool}, para quién es, qué introduces y cómo leer el resultado. Soporte a la decisión sobre precio y riesgo de margen de SectorCalc.
premiumSeo.h1: {tool}: pon precio al trabajo y protege el margen
premiumSeo.intro: {tool} te ayuda a poner a prueba un trabajo antes de comprometerte con un precio. Convierte tus costes, cantidades y tarifas en una lectura clara de margen y riesgo, para detectar los factores ocultos que erosionan el beneficio en silencio y decidir con confianza en vez de adivinar en la oferta.
premiumSeo.howTo: Introduce {inputs} para tu escenario de {sector}. SectorCalc ejecuta fórmulas deterministas gobernadas y devuelve {outputs}. Añade campos opcionales para afinar umbrales y riesgos.
premiumSeo.method: {tool} usa la capa de gobernanza de fórmulas de SectorCalc: entradas validadas, pipeline determinista y comprobaciones de umbral. Simulación técnica — no asesoramiento financiero, legal ni de ingeniería.
premiumSeo.mistakes: Tarifas obsoletas, campos opcionales omitidos, unidades mezcladas y leer el resultado como beneficio garantizado son errores habituales. {pain} Verifica las entradas antes de decidir.
premiumSeo.problem: La mayoría de los trabajos pierden margen mucho antes de la factura, cuando la preparación, los retrabajos, los sobrecostes y las partidas mal valoradas nunca se suman antes de enviar el presupuesto. {tool} hace visibles esos factores para que dejen de sorprenderte.
premiumSeo.help: Aplica el motor de cálculo determinista de SectorCalc a tus datos y resalta los factores que más mueven el resultado. Obtienes una lectura estructurada y defendible, no un número de caja negra.
premiumSeo.who: Operadores, estimadores, propietarios y responsables que ponen precio al trabajo, revisan ofertas o necesitan una base coherente en el equipo son quienes más aprovechan {tool}.
premiumSeo.inputs: Los campos principales incluyen {inputs} ({inputCount} entradas en total). Los obligatorios se mantienen al mínimo; los opcionales afinan el veredicto.
premiumSeo.outputs: {tool} devuelve {outputs} con métricas, alertas de umbral y factores de riesgo — ves por qué el número queda donde queda.
premiumSeo.trustTitle: Resúmenes de decisión premium y Resumen del cálculo
premiumSeo.trust: Los resultados premium pueden incluir un Resumen del cálculo guardado como resumen de decisión exportable.

faq.a: Puede previsualizar el enfoque gratis; veredicto completo, métricas y resumen de decisión premium están incluidos en SectorCalc Pro.
No. Es una simulación técnica y una herramienta de apoyo a la decisión, no asesoramiento financiero, legal ni de ingeniería. Verifica los resultados antes de decidir.
Los resultados reflejan tus entradas y el motor determinista de SectorCalc. Mejores entradas producen una lectura más fina y defendible.
Sí. Los resultados premium pueden exportarse como resúmenes de decisión con un Resumen del cálculo.
Está ajustada a los patrones de precio y margen de su sector y convive con el resto del conjunto de 27 sectores de SectorCalc.
Abre el analizador, introduce {inputs} y revisa {outputs}. Ajusta las entradas para probar el escenario.

items.q: ¿En qué se diferencia Business de Enterprise?
items.a: Business cubre calculadoras premium, resúmenes de decisión premium y flujos de campo. Enterprise añade gobernanza y paquetes.
Sí. SectorCalc cubre 27 sectores, y los paquetes sectoriales agrupan los calculadoras que tus equipos usan más.
Los resúmenes de decisión premium incluyen un resumen del cálculo para revisión interna.
Solicita una demo y hablaremos de tus sectores, el tamaño de tu equipo y tu despliegue. Los precios de los planes individuales están en la página de precios.

homeAbout.title: Sobre nosotros
homeAbout.paragraph1: La rentabilidad suele escaparse de las empresas a través de costos inadvertidos, no de las ventas. Precios incorrectos, errores de cálculo, desperdicio, pérdida de eficiencia y una débil disciplina de cotización erosionan los márgenes en silencio con el tiempo.
homeAbout.paragraph2: SectorCalc está diseñado para hacer cuantificables estas pérdidas invisibles. Eleva las decisiones de costo, propuesta, eficiencia y riesgo a una base más rápida, más transparente y más confiable.
homeAbout.beliefSubtitle: La precisión en el cálculo es la base de un rendimiento confiable.
homeAbout.highlightPrimary: Una plataforma para exponer pérdidas ocultas,
homeAbout.highlightSecondary: y transformar el cálculo en apoyo confiable a la decisión.
homeAbout.ctaAria: Lee la historia completa de SectorCalc

aboutPage.seoTitle: Acerca de SectorCalc | Cálculo industrial y apoyo a la decisión
aboutPage.seoDescription: SectorCalc ayuda a las empresas a exponer pérdidas ocultas, cuantificar riesgos operativos y convertir los cálculos industriales en apoyo confiable a la decisión.

hero.title: El cálculo, convertido en decisiones confiables.
hero.lead: SectorCalc es una plataforma global de cálculo industrial y apoyo a la decisión que ayuda a las empresas a exponer pérdidas ocultas y actuar con confianza.

why.title: Por qué existe SectorCalc
why.body: La mayoría de las pérdidas operativas nunca aparecen en una factura. Se esconden en los precios, el desperdicio, el tiempo de preparación, las caídas de eficiencia y la débil disciplina de cotización, y erosionan los márgenes en silencio durante años.

what.title: Qué es SectorCalc
what.body: Un conjunto enfocado de calculadoras sectoriales e informes de decisión que convierten datos operativos en bruto en cifras claras y defendibles, ni otra hoja de cálculo ni un ERP pesado.

problem.title: El problema que resolvemos
problem.body: Los equipos toman decisiones de costo, cotización y riesgo con información incompleta. SectorCalc hace medible lo invisible, para que las decisiones se basen en evidencia y no en suposiciones.

how.title: Cómo funciona nuestro sistema
how.body: Usted aporta las entradas que conoce; el sistema resuelve lo requerido, ejecuta cálculos deterministas gobernados y valida cada resultado frente a invariantes y referencias antes de mostrarlo.

different.title: Qué nos hace diferentes
different.body: Cada resultado incluye un resumen del cálculo transparente, benchmarks regionales indicativos y supuestos documentados que su equipo puede revisar antes de decidir.

who.title: Para quién está hecho
who.body: Para propietarios, estimadores, equipos de campo y consultores que necesitan respuestas rápidas y confiables sin contratar un área de precios completa ni desplegar software empresarial.

building.title: Qué estamos construyendo
building.body: Un estándar global de inteligencia de cálculo sectorial, que se expande por las industrias manteniendo cada fórmula gobernada, auditable y confiable.

manifesto.primary: Una plataforma para exponer pérdidas ocultas,
manifesto.secondary: y transformar el cálculo en apoyo confiable a la decisión.

width.helper: Ancho of the Área to be calculated. Standard SI unit. usado in construction, real estate, and manufacturing for Área measurement.

shape.label: Shape

radius.label: Radius

base.label: Base
base.helper: Base Longitud for triangle or trapezoid. Required when shape is 'triangle' or 'trapezoid'. Standard SI unit.

height.label: Altura
height.helper: Altura for triangle or trapezoid. Required when shape is 'triangle' or 'trapezoid'. Standard SI unit.

topbase.label: Top Base
topbase.helper: Top base Longitud for trapezoid. Required when shape is 'trapezoid'. Standard SI unit.

length.label: Longitud
length.helper: Longitud of the Área to be calculated. Standard measurement for square footage.

width.helper: Ancho of the Área to be calculated. Standard measurement for square footage.

shape.label: Shape
shape.helper: Shape of the Área. Diffealquiler formulas apply for diffealquiler shapes.

radius.label: Radius
radius.helper: Radio for circular Áreas. Required when shape is 'circle'.

base.label: Base
base.helper: Base Longitud for triangular Áreas. Required when shape is 'triangle'.

height.label: Altura

length.label: Longitud
length.helper: Longitud of the concrete element (e.g., slab, beam). Based on structural engineering standards (ACI 318).

wastefactor.helper: Additional concrete allowance for Despordicio, spillage, and over-excavation. Typical range 5-10% por ACI 304R.

unitcost.label: Concrete Unit Costoo
unitcost.helper: Costo por cubic meter of concrete mix. Varies by region and mix design.

projectvolume.label: Project Volumen
projectvolume.helper: Total Volumen of concrete needed for the project. Based on ASTM C94 standard for ready-mixed concrete.

bagsize.label: Bag Size

cementdensity.helper: Bulk Densidad of cement. Typically 1440 kg/m³ por ASTM C188.

sanddensity.label: Sand Densidad
sanddensity.helper: Bulk Densidad of sand. Typically 1600 kg/m³ por ASTM C29.

aggregatedensity.helper: Bulk Densidad of coarse aggregate. Typically 1500 kg/m³ por ASTM C29.

watercementratio.helper: Water to cement ratio by Peso. Affects strength and workability. por ACI 318, typical 0.4-0.6.

sandcost.label: Sand Costo por Tonne
sandcost.helper: Costo of sand por metric tonne. Local market Precio.

aggregatecost.label: Aggregate Costo por Tonne
aggregatecost.helper: Costo of coarse aggregate por metric tonne. Local market Precio.

watercost.label: Water Costo por m³
watercost.helper: Costo of water por cubic meter. Utility Tasa.

laborrate.helper: Hourly wage for construction labor. Varies by region.

laborhoursperm3.label: Labor Horas por m³
laborhoursperm3.helper: Estimated Labor Horas required to mix and place one cubic meter of concrete. Based on industry benchmarks.

equipmentcost.label: Equipment Costo por m³
equipmentcost.helper: Costo of mixer, vibrator, etc. por m³. Includes depreciation and Combustible.

dataconfidence.label: Data Confidence
dataconfidence.helper: Confidence level in input data accuracy. usado for risk adjustment.

paintvolume.label: Paint Volumen
paintvolume.helper: Total Volumen of paint to be usado. Based on manufacturer specifications and ASTM D2697.

coveragerate.label: Coverage Tasa
coveragerate.helper: Typical Cobertura por litro; varies by paint type and surface. Refer to ISO 8501 for surface preparation standards.

numberofcoats.helper: Number of Capas applied. Industry standard for most applications is 2 Capas.

wastefactor.label: Despordicio Factor
wastefactor.helper: porcentage of paint Despordiciod due to overspray, spillage, etc. Typical range 5-15% based on Lean manufacturing principles.

painttype.helper: Type of paint affects coverage Tasa and application method. Refer to ASTM D5146 for paint testing.

surfacecondition.label: Surface Condition
surfacecondition.helper: Surface texture impacts paint absorption and coverage. Based on ISO 8501 surface preparation grades.

applicationmethod.label: Application Method
applicationmethod.helper: Method affects transfer efficiency and Despordicio. Spray has higher Despordicio; brush/roller more efficient.

roomlength.label: Room Longitud
roomlength.helper: Longitud of the room to be floored. Standard architectural measurement por ISO 9001.

roomwidth.label: Room Ancho
roomwidth.helper: Ancho of the room. usado to calculate Área.

flooringunitcost.label: Flooring Unit Costoo
flooringunitcost.helper: Costo por square meter of flooring Material. Market Precio based on supplier quotes.

wastefactor.label: Despordicio Factor
wastefactor.helper: porcentage of Material Despordicio due to cutting and fitting. Industry standard 5-15% por Lean construction practices.

laborcostperhour.label: Labor Costo por Hour
laborcostperhour.helper: Hourly wage for flooring installers. Based on local Labor Tasas.

installationtimepersqm.label: Installation Time por m²
installationtimepersqm.helper: Time required to install one square meter of flooring. Industry benchmark from RSMeans.

additionalcosts.label: Additional Costos
additionalcosts.helper: Miscellaneous Costos like adhesive, underlayment, or disposal fees.

dataconfidence.label: Data Confidence
dataconfidence.helper: Confidence level in input data accuracy. usado for risk adjustment por Six Sigma DMAIC.

rooflength.label: Roof Longitud
rooflength.helper: Longitud of the roof along the ridge. Based on standard architectural measurements.

roofwidth.label: Roof Ancho
roofwidth.helper: Ancho of the roof from eave to eave. Standard dimension for rectangular roofs.

roofpitch.label: Roof Pitch (rise/run)
roofpitch.helper: Slope of the roof expressed as rise over run. Common Valors: 0.5 (6/12), 1.0 (12/12).

wastefactor.label: Despordicio Factor
wastefactor.helper: porcentage of Material Despordicio due to cutting and overlap. Industry standard 5-15%.

rooftype.helper: Architectural style affecting Área calculation. Gable: simple triangle ends; Hip: slopes on all sides.

riserheight.label: Riser Altura
riserheight.helper: Building codes (e.g., IBC, Eurocode) specify Riser Altura between 100-220 mm for safety and comfort.

treaddepth.label: Tread Profundidad
treaddepth.helper: Building codes require Tread Profundidad typically 200-400 mm to ensure adequate foot space.

stairwidth.label: Stair Ancho
stairwidth.helper: Minimum Ancho por building codes (e.g., 800 mm for residential, 1000 mm for commercial).

materialtype.label: Material Type
materialtype.helper: Material affects structural design, Costo, and durability. Standards: ACI 318 for concrete, AISC for steel.

unitcostmaterial.label: Unit Costoo of Material
unitcostmaterial.helper: Costo por cubic meter of chosen Material; varies by region and quality.

laborrate.label: Labor Tasa
laborrate.helper: Hourly wage for construction labor; includes overhead.

laborhoursperstep.label: Labor Horas por Step
laborhoursperstep.helper: Estimated labor time to construct one step; based on industry benchmarks.

wastefactor.label: Despordicio Factor
wastefactor.helper: porcentage of Material Despordicio due to cutting, errors; typical 5-10%.

dataconfidence.label: Data Confidence
dataconfidence.helper: Confidence level in input data; usado for risk-adjusted outputs.

walllength.label: Wall Longitud
walllength.helper: Total Longitud of wall to be covered. Standard construction practice (ASTM C840).

wallheight.label: Wall Altura
wallheight.helper: Altura of wall. Typical residential Altura de techo 8-10 ft.

sheetwidth.helper: Standard drywall sheet Ancho. Common sizes: 4 ft (ASTM C1396).

sheetlength.label: Sheet Longitud
sheetlength.helper: Standard drywall Sheet Longitud. Common sizes: 8, 10, 12 ft.

wastefactor.label: Despordicio Factor
wastefactor.helper: porcentage of Material Despordicio due to cuts and errors. Industry standard 5-15% (RSMeans).

laborrate.label: Labor Tasa
laborrate.helper: Hourly wage for drywall installers. Varies by region (BLS data).

materialcostpersheet.label: Material Costo por Sheet
materialcostpersheet.helper: Costo por drywall sheet. Depends on Espesor, type (e.g., moisture resistant).

laborproductivity.helper: Number of sheets installed por hour por worker. Typical 1-3 sheets/hr (RSMeans).

numworkers.label: Number of Workers

walllength.label: Wall Longitud
walllength.helper: Longitud of the wall to be built. Standard construction practice.

wallheight.label: Wall Altura
wallheight.helper: Altura of the wall. Standard construction practice.

bricklength.label: Brick Longitud
bricklength.helper: Longitud of a single brick. Common brick size por ISO 9001.

brickheight.label: Brick Altura
brickheight.helper: Altura of a single brick. Common brick size por ISO 9001.

brickdepth.helper: Profundidad of a single brick. Common brick size por ISO 9001.

wastefactor.helper: porcentage of bricks Despordiciod due to breakage or cutting. Industry standard 5-10%.

bondtype.helper: Type of brick bond pattern. Affects brick count por Área. Common masonry standards.

quantity.helper: Total number of identical rebars to calculate Total Peso.

diameter.helper: Standard rebar Diámetros por ASTM A615/A615M. Common sizes: 6, 8, 10, 12, 14, 16, 18, 20, 22, 25, 28, 32, 36, 40, 50 mm.

length.helper: Longitud of rebar piece. Typical stock Longituds: 6m, 12m, 18m. User can input custom Longitud.

steeldensity.helper: Densidad of steel. Standard Valor 7850 kg/m³ por ASTM A36. Variations for diffealquiler steel grades.

unitsystem.helper: Select unit system. Metric uses mm, m, kg. Imporial uses inch, ft, lb. Conversion factors applied.

length.helper: Longitud of excavation Área. Based on civil engineering standards (e.g., ASTM D3740).

width.helper: Ancho of excavation Área. Common in earthwork calculations.

slopeangle.helper: Angle of excavation sides for safety and Volumen adjustment. OSHA standards recommend max 34° for Type A soil.

walllength.label: Wall Longitud
walllength.helper: Longitud of the wall to be plastered. Standard construction measurement.

plasterthickness.helper: Espesor of plaster layer. Typical range 10-20 mm for internal walls.

cementdensity.helper: Bulk Densidad of cement. Typically 1440 kg/m³ por IS 875.

sanddensity.label: Sand Densidad
sanddensity.helper: Bulk Densidad of sand. Typically 1600 kg/m³.

laborrate.helper: Costo of labor por square meter of plastering. Varies by region.

cementprice.label: Cement Precio
cementprice.helper: Precio por bag of cement (typically 50 kg).

sandprice.helper: Precio por cubic meter of sand.

roomwidth.helper: Physical dimension of the room. Standard construction practice (ISO 1000).

laborcostperm2.helper: Installation Labor Tasa. Varies by region and complexity. Industry benchmarks from BLS or RSMeans.

additionalcosts.helper: Miscellaneous Costos: underlayment, adhesive, removal of old flooring, etc.

dataconfidence.helper: User's confidence in input data accuracy. usado for risk adjustment. Common in project management (PMBOK).

loanamount.label: Loan Amount
loanamount.helper: Capital amount borrowed. Standard financial practice por GAAP.

annualinterestrate.label: Annual Interest Tasa
annualinterestrate.helper: Annual nominal interest Tasa. Based on market Tasas and lender Plazos.

loantermmonths.helper: Duración of loan in months. Common Plazos: 12, 24, 36, 48, 60, 120, 240, 360.

paymentfrequency.helper: How often payments are made. Affects compounding and total interest.

propertytaxrate.helper: porcentage of home Valor paid annually in proporty taxes.

homeinsurancerate.helper: porcentage of home Valor paid annually for insurance.

pmirate.helper: Private mortgage insurance Tasa if down payment < 20%.

annualincome.helper: Borrower's annual income for debt-to-income ratio.

monthlydebts.label: Other Monthly Debt Payments
monthlydebts.helper: Existing monthly debt obligations (car loans, student loans, etc.).

principal.label: Capital Amount
principal.helper: Initial amount of money borrowed or invested. Standard financial practice.

annualinterestrate.label: Annual Interest Tasa
annualinterestrate.helper: Yearly interest Tasa as a porcentage. Common in loan and investment calculations.

timeperiod.label: Time poriod
timeperiod.helper: Duración for which interest is calculated. Typically in Años.

compoundingfrequency.label: Compounding Frequency
compoundingfrequency.helper: How often interest is compounded. Affects total interest earned/paid.

interesttype.label: Interest Type
interesttype.helper: Simple interest is linear; compound interest grows exponentially.

dataconfidence.label: Data Confidence
dataconfidence.helper: Confidence level in input data. usado for risk-adjusted outputs.

principal.label: Capital Amount
principal.helper: Initial investment or loan amount. Standard financial practice.

annualinterestrate.label: Annual Interest Tasa (%)
annualinterestrate.helper: Nominal annual interest Tasa. Based on market Tasas or contract Plazos.

compoundingfrequency.label: Compounding Frequency
compoundingfrequency.helper: Number of compounding poriods por year. Common Valors: annually (1), semi-annually (2), quarterly (4), monthly (12), daily (365), or continuous.

timeperiod.label: Time poriod
timeperiod.helper: Duración of investment or loan in Años. Standard financial planning horizon.

additionalcontribution.helper: Regular contribution added each compounding poriod. Common in savings plans.

contributiontiming.label: Contribution Timing
contributiontiming.helper: Whether contributions are made at the beginning or end of each poriod. Affects Future Valor calculation.

originalprice.helper: The initial Precio before any discount. Standard pricing practice por ISO 9001:2015 clause 7.1.5 (monitoring and measuring resources).

discountpercent.helper: porcentage reduction applied to Original Precio. Common in retail and B2B pricing stTasagies; referenced in financial accounting standards (IFRS 15).

quantity.label: Cantidad
quantity.helper: Number of items purchased. Volumen discounts are typical in supply chain management (APICS/SCOR model).

taxrate.helper: Sales tax or VAT applicable. Based on local tax regulations; ISO 14000 may apply for environmental taxes.

additionaldiscount.label: Additional Discount
additionaldiscount.helper: Fixed additional discount (e.g., coupon). Common in promotional campaigns; referenced in marketing ROI analysis.

currency.label: Currency
currency.helper: Currency for moNetoary Valors. ISO 4217 currency codes standard.

value.label: Valor

percentage.label: porcentage

basevalue.helper: The base Valor for porcentage change calculations. Required when mode is 'porcentageChange'.

resultvalue.helper: The resulting Valor for ValorFromporcentage mode. Required when mode is 'ValorFromporcentage'.

taxrate.label: Effective Tax Tasa
taxrate.helper: Effective corpoTasa tax Tasa. Based on jurisdiction (OECD average ~25%).

interestexpense.label: Interest Expense
interestexpense.helper: Costo of debt financing. usado to compute Neto profit margin.

dataconfidence.helper: Subjective confidence in input data accuracy. Adjusts output reliability. Based on risk management practices (ISO 31000).

fixedcosts.label: Fixed Costoos
fixedcosts.helper: Total Fixed Costoos (e.g., alquiler, salaries, insurance) por poriod. Based on Costo accounting standards (e.g., GAAP, IFRS).

variablecostperunit.label: Variable Costooo por unit
variablecostperunit.helper: Costo that varies with production Volumen (e.g., Materials, labor). Standard in managerial accounting.

sellingpriceperunit.helper: Revenue por unit sold. Must exceed Variable Costoo for positive contribution margin.

timeperiod.label: Time poriod
timeperiod.helper: poriod for which Fixed Costoos are defined. Aligns with financial reporting poriods.

targetprofit.label: Objetivo Profit
targetprofit.helper: Desired profit above break-even. usado for Objetivo Volumen calculations.

dataconfidence.label: Data Confidence
dataconfidence.helper: Confidence level in input data (e.g., based on historical accuracy). Adjusts results for uncertainty.

initialinvestment.label: Initial Investment
initialinvestment.helper: Total upfront Costo including equipment, installation, and training. Based on capital budgeting standards (NPV, IRR).

annualnetcashinflow.helper: Expected annual incremental cash inFlujos minus outFlujos from the investment. Based on discounted cash Flujo analysis.

projectlifetime.helper: Expected Vida útil of the investment. Typical range 1-50 Años based on asset depreciation standards (MACRS).

discountrate.helper: Costo of capital or required Tasa of return. Based on CAPM or WACC standards.

salvagevalue.label: Valor residual
salvagevalue.helper: Estimated residual Valor At end of project lifetime. Based on asset depreciation methods.

annualoperatingcost.label: Annual Oporating Costo
annualoperatingcost.helper: Recurring Costos such as maintenance, labor, Energía. Based on life cycle Costoing (ISO 15686).

annualrevenueincrease.label: Annual Revenue Increase
annualrevenueincrease.helper: Expected additional revenue from the investment. Based on market analysis and forecasting.

dataconfidence.label: Data Confidence Level
dataconfidence.helper: Subjective confidence in input data accuracy. usado for risk-adjusted ROI. Based on sensitivity analysis standards.

annualsalary.label: Annual Salary (Gross)
annualsalary.helper: Base annual gross salary por employee. Standard HR metric.

bonuspercentage.label: Bonus porcentage
bonuspercentage.helper: Annual bonus as porcentage of salary. Common in compensation packages.

employertaxrate.helper: Employer-paid taxes (e.g., Social Security, Medicare in US). Varies by country.

hoursperday.helper: Standard working Horas por day. Typical: 8.

productiveutilization.label: Productive Utilization Tasa

annualsalary.label: Annual Salary
annualsalary.helper: Base annual salary of the employee. Standard compensation practice.

benefitspercent.label: Benefits porcentage
benefitspercent.helper: porcentage of salary for benefits (health, retirement, etc.). Typical range 25-35%.

overheadpercent.label: Overhead porcentage
overheadpercent.helper: Indirect Costos (facilities, equipment, admin). Industry benchmark 40-60%.

profitmarginpercent.label: Profit Margin porcentage
profitmarginpercent.helper: Desired profit margin on labor. Typical 10-30%.

paidhoursperyear.label: Paid Horas por Year
paidhoursperyear.helper: Total paid Horas (40 hrs/week * 52 weeks). Standard full-time.

billablehoursperyear.helper: Horas actually billed to clients. Typically 85-90% of paid Horas.

dataconfidence.helper: Confidence in input data accuracy. Affects adjustment factor.

assetcost.label: Asset Costoo
assetcost.helper: Initial Costo of the asset. Based on accounting standards (IAS 16, GAAP).

salvagevalue.label: Valor residual
salvagevalue.helper: Estimated residual Valor At end of Vida útil. por IAS 16.

usefullife.label: Vida útil

productionunits.helper: Estimated total units to be produced over life. usado in units-of-production method.

unitsproducedthisyear.helper: Actual units produced in Corriente poriod for units-of-production method.

dataconfidence.helper: Confidence level in input data (0-100%). usado for adjusted output.

accountsreceivable.label: Accounts Receivable (Alacaklar)
accountsreceivable.helper: Average accounts receivable balance. Based on standard financial statement analysis (GAAP/IFRS).

accountspayable.label: Accounts Payable (Borçlar)
accountspayable.helper: Average accounts payable balance. Standard financial metric.

inventory.label: Inventory (Stok)
inventory.helper: Average inventory Valor. Based on supply chain management principles (APICS).

costofgoodssold.label: Costo of Goods Sold (COGS)
costofgoodssold.helper: Annual Costo of goods sold. Standard income statement item.

operatingexpenses.helper: Annual oporating expenses excluding COGS. Standard financial metric.

dataconfidence.helper: Confidence level in input data quality. usado for adjusted outputs.

planneddowntimeperday.label: Planned Downtime por Day (Horas)
planneddowntimeperday.helper: Scheduled maintenance, breaks, etc. ISO 22400 for manufacturing oporations management.

unplanneddowntimeperday.label: Unplanned Downtime por Day (Horas)
unplanneddowntimeperday.helper: Breakdowns, Preparación, adjustments. Lean manufacturing focus on reducing unplanned downtime.

operatingspeed.label: Oporating Speed (units por hour)
operatingspeed.helper: Actual production speed. Compared to ideal speed for Rendimiento calculation.

idealspeed.label: Ideal Speed (units por hour)
idealspeed.helper: Theoretical maximum speed. usado for Rendimiento metric in OEE.

defectrate.label: Defect Tasa (fraction)
defectrate.helper: Proportion of defective units. Quality metric in Six Sigma.

hourlycost.label: Hourly Costo (currency por hour)
hourlycost.helper: Machine oporating Costo including labor, Energía, maintenance. usado for Costo analysis.

dataconfidence.label: Data Confidence (0-1)
dataconfidence.helper: Confidence in input data accuracy. Adjusts final output for risk.

cuttinglength.label: Cutting Longitud
cuttinglength.helper: Total Longitud of Material to be cut along the tool path. Based on ISO 8688-1 tool life testing standards.

feedrate.label: Feed Tasa
feedrate.helper: Linear feed speed of the cutting tool. Typical Valors from machinery handbook (e.g., 0.1-0.5 mm/rev for steel).

spindlespeed.label: Spindle Speed
spindlespeed.helper: Rotational speed of the spindle. DePlazoines cutting speed; standard ranges por Material (e.g., 2000-6000 RPM for aluminum).

numberofpasses.label: Number of Passes
numberofpasses.helper: Number of cutting passes required to achieve final dimension. Based on Profundidad of cut and Material removal Tasa.

rapidtraverserate.label: Rapid Traverse Tasa
rapidtraverserate.helper: Maximum speed for non-cutting movements (tool positioning). Typical machine specs: 10-30 m/min.

rapiddistance.label: Rapid Traverse Distancia
rapiddistance.helper: Total Distancia traveled during rapid moves por cycle. Includes approach and retract.

toolchangetime.label: Tool Change Time
toolchangetime.helper: Time to change a tool. Typical automatic tool changer: 2-10 sec.

numberoftoolchanges.label: Number of Tool Changes
numberoftoolchanges.helper: Number of tool changes por cycle. Based on oporation sequence.

loadingunloadingtime.label: Loading/Unloading Time
loadingunloadingtime.helper: Time to load and unload workpiece. Manual: 20-60 sec; automated: 5-15 sec.

idletime.label: Idle Time por Cycle
idletime.helper: Non-productive time por cycle (e.g., dwell, inspection). Lean manufacturing focus on reducing idle time.

dataconfidence.label: Data Confidence Level
dataconfidence.helper: Confidence in input data accuracy. Low: ±20% uncertainty; Medium: ±10%; High: ±5%. Based on Six Sigma data quality assessment.

laborrate.label: Labor Tasa
laborrate.helper: Hourly welder Tasa

materialtype.label: Material Type
materialtype.helper: Material type affects cutting speed and Potencia requirements. Based on laser cutting industry standards (e.g., Trumpf, Bystronic).

materialthickness.label: Material Espesor
materialthickness.helper: Espesor directly impacts cutting speed and time. Typical range for laser cutting: 0.5-25 mm.

cuttinglength.label: Total Cutting Longitud
cuttinglength.helper: Total Longitud of cuts por part or batch. DePlazoines primary cutting time.

cuttingspeed.label: Cutting Speed
cuttingspeed.helper: Speed depends on Material and Espesor. Typical Valors from machine manufacturer tables.

piercingtimeperpierce.label: Piercing Time por Pierce
piercingtimeperpierce.helper: Time to pierce the Material at start of each cut. Varies with Material and Espesor.

numberofpierces.label: Number of Pierces
numberofpierces.helper: Number of pierces por part or batch. Typically equals number of cut contours.

rapidtraversedistance.label: Rapid Traverse Distancia
rapidtraversedistance.helper: Distancia the laser head moves without cutting (positioning).

rapidtraversespeed.label: Rapid Traverse Speed
rapidtraversespeed.helper: Maximum positioning speed of the laser head. Typical: 60-120 m/min.

setuptime.label: Preparación Time
setuptime.helper: Time for loading Material, programming, and machine preparation.

batchsize.label: Batch Size
batchsize.helper: Number of identical parts in the batch. Affects Preparación amortization.

laborcostperhour.label: Labor Costo por Hour
laborcostperhour.helper: Oporator labor Costo including overhead. Typical range: $20-$80/h.

machinecostperhour.label: Machine Costoo por Hour
machinecostperhour.helper: Machine depreciation, maintenance, Energía, and Consumibles. Typical: $30-$200/h.

dataconfidence.label: Data Confidence
dataconfidence.helper: User's confidence in input data accuracy. Affects output adjustment for risk.

laborrate.label: Labor Tasa
laborrate.helper: Oporator Tasa

materialcostperkg.label: Material Costo por kg
materialcostperkg.helper: Costo of filament or resin por kilogram. Typical range for PLA: $20-50, ABS: $30-60, resin: $50-150. Source: industry benchmarks.

materialdensity.label: Material Densidad
materialdensity.helper: Densidad of printing Material. PLA ~1.24 g/cm³, ABS ~1.04 g/cm³, PETG ~1.27 g/cm³. usado to convert Volumen to Peso.

partvolume.label: Part Volumen
partvolume.helper: Volumen of the printed part, typically from CAD model. Affects Material usage and print time.

infillpercentage.label: Infill porcentage
infillpercentage.helper: porcentage of internal Volumen filled with Material. 0% for hollow, 100% for solid. Affects Material usage and strength.

printtimehours.label: Print Time
printtimehours.helper: Estimated print Duración. Affects machine and labor Costo. Typical range: 1-100 Horas.

machinecostperhour.label: Machine Costoo por Hour
machinecostperhour.helper: Depreciation, maintenance, and Electricity Costoo por hour. For a $2000 printer over 2000 Horas: $1/hour plus electricity $0.1-0.5/hour.

laborcostperhour.label: Labor Costo por Hour
laborcostperhour.helper: Oporator's hourly wage including overhead. Affects post-processing and monitoring time.

postprocessingtimehours.label: Post-Processing Time
postprocessingtimehours.helper: Time for support removal, sanding, painting, etc. Affects labor Costo.

failurerate.label: Failure Tasa
failurerate.helper: porcentage of prints that fail. Affects effective Costo por successful part. Typical range: 2-20%.

batchsize.label: Batch Size
batchsize.helper: Number of identical parts printed in one run. Affects Preparación Costo amortization.

setupcost.label: Preparación Costo
setupcost.helper: One-time Costo for file preparation, bed leveling, etc. Amortized over batch size.

overheadrate.label: Overhead Tasa
overheadrate.helper: porcentage added to direct Costos for facility, admin, etc. Typical: 15-30%.

profitmargin.label: Profit Margin
profitmargin.helper: Desired profit margin on Total Costoo. Typical: 20-50%.

materialtype.label: Material Type
materialtype.helper: Material Densidad varies; standard densities from ASM Handbook.

thickness.label: Espesor
thickness.helper: Sheet Espesor; typical range 0.1-100 mm por ISO 3574.

width.label: Ancho
width.helper: Sheet Ancho; standard Anchos up to 5000 mm.

length.label: Longitud
length.helper: Sheet Longitud; standard Longituds up to 12000 mm.

unitsystem.label: Unit System
unitsystem.helper: Select measurement system; metric (mm, kg) or imporial (in, lb).

totalmaterialinput.label: Total Material Input
totalmaterialinput.helper: Total raw Material entering the production process. Based on ISO 14051 Material Flujo Costo accounting (MFCA) standards.

goodoutput.label: Producción buena
goodoutput.helper: Cantidad of product meeting quality specifications. Derived from Six Sigma yield metrics.

scraprate.label: Scrap Tasa
scraprate.helper: porcentage of Material that becomes scrap during processing. Based on lean manufacturing Despordicio reduction principles.

reworkrate.label: Rework Tasa
reworkrate.helper: porcentage of output requiring rework. Common metric in quality management (ISO 9001).

materialcostperkg.label: Material Costo por kg
materialcostperkg.helper: Purchase Costoo of raw Material por kilogram. usado for financial impact calculation.

disposalcostperkg.label: Disposal Costo por kg
disposalcostperkg.helper: Costo to dispose of Despordicio Material. Environmental Costo factor por ISO 14000.

productionvolume.label: Production Volumen
productionvolume.helper: Total units produced in the poriod. usado to scale Despordicio calculations.

timeperiod.label: Time poriod
timeperiod.helper: Time basis for calculations. Enables scaling to annual Despordicio and Costo.

dataconfidence.label: Data Confidence Level
dataconfidence.helper: Confidence in input data accuracy. Adjusts output reliability. Based on data quality assessment frameworks.

totalproductionquantity.label: Total Production Cantidad
totalproductionquantity.helper: Total number of units produced in the poriod. Based on production records (ISO 9001).

scrapquantity.label: Scrap Cantidad
scrapquantity.helper: Number of units scrapped due to defects or Despordicio. Direct measure from quality control (Six Sigma).

reworkquantity.label: Rework Cantidad
reworkquantity.helper: Units that required rework but not scrapped. Important for total Despordicio analysis (Lean).

costperunit.label: Costoo por unit
costperunit.helper: Average Costo to produce one unit including Materials, labor, overhead. usado for financial impact (Managerial Accounting).

reworkcostperunit.label: Rework Costoo por unit
reworkcostperunit.helper: Additional Costo to rework one unit. Typically lower than original Costo but significant (Lean Accounting).

perioddays.label: poriod Días
perioddays.helper: Number of Días in the analysis poriod. usado for Tasa normalization (standard reporting).

dataconfidence.label: Data Confidence
dataconfidence.helper: Subjective confidence in data accuracy. Affects adjustment factor for outputs (risk management).

plannedproductiontime.label: Planned Production Time
plannedproductiontime.helper: Total time scheduled for production por shift/day. Based on ISO 22400 (KPIs for manufacturing oporations management).

operatingtime.label: Oporating Time
operatingtime.helper: Actual time the equipment is running (planned production time minus downtime). Key for Disponibilidad calculation.

idealcycletime.label: Ideal Cycle Time
idealcycletime.helper: Theoretical minimum time to produce one unit under optimal conditions. usado in Rendimiento calculation.

totalpartsproduced.label: Total Parts Produced
totalpartsproduced.helper: Total number of parts produced during oporating time. Includes both good and defective parts.

goodpartsproduced.label: Good Parts Produced
goodpartsproduced.helper: Number of parts meeting quality standards. usado in Quality calculation.

dataconfidence.label: Data Confidence Level
dataconfidence.helper: Subjective assessment of data accuracy. Adjusts final OEE for uncertainty. Common in lean manufacturing assessments.

machinepurchasecost.label: Machine Purchase Costoo
machinepurchasecost.helper: Initial capital investment for the machine. Based on standard Costo accounting principles (Maynard).

usefullifeyears.label: Vida útil (Años)
usefullifeyears.helper: Expected oporational life of the machine. Typical range 5-20 Años por industry standards (ISO 15663).

salvagevalue.label: Valor residual
salvagevalue.helper: Estimated resale Valor At end of Vida útil. Usually 5-20% of Purchase Costoo.

annualoperatinghours.label: Annual Oporating Horas
annualoperatinghours.helper: Total Horas the machine is opeTasad por year. Based on typical single shift (2000 hrs) or multi-shift oporations.

maintenancecostperyear.label: Annual Maintenance Costo
maintenancecostperyear.helper: Average yearly maintenance expenses including parts and labor. Typically 2-5% of Purchase Costoo.

energyconsumptionkw.label: Energía Consumo (kW)
energyconsumptionkw.helper: Average Potencia draw during oporation. Based on machine specifications (ISO 50001).

energycostperkwh.label: Energía Costoo por kWh
energycostperkwh.helper: Local electricity Tasa. Varies by region; typical range $0.05-$0.30.

operatorlaborcostperhour.label: Oporator Labor Costo por Hour
operatorlaborcostperhour.placeholder: Introduzca oporator labor costo por hour
operatorlaborcostperhour.helper: Hourly wage including benefits for machine oporator. Based on labor market data.

floorspacesqft.label: Floor Space Occupied (sq ft)
floorspacesqft.helper: Área occupied by the machine including clearance. usado for space Costo allocation.

annualfacilitycostpersqft.label: Annual Facility Costo por sq ft
annualfacilitycostpersqft.placeholder: Introduzca annual facility costo por sq ft
annualfacilitycostpersqft.helper: Yearly Costo por square foot for alquiler, utilities, insurance, etc. Typical $5-$20.

otherannualcosts.label: Other Annual Costos
otherannualcosts.helper: Miscellaneous Costos such as Consumibles, software licenses, etc.

dataconfidence.label: Data Confidence Level
dataconfidence.helper: User's confidence in input data accuracy. Affects adjustment factor for final Tasa.

workpiecematerial.label: Workpiece Material
workpiecematerial.helper: Material type dePlazoines recommended cutting speed range. Based on ISO 513 classification and machining handbooks (e.g., Machining Data Handbook, 3rd ed.).

toolmaterial.label: Tool Material
toolmaterial.helper: Tool Material affects cutting speed capability. Higher hardness Materials allow higher speeds. Reference: ISO 513.

operationtype.label: Oporation Type
operationtype.helper: Diffealquiler oporations have diffealquiler speed recommendations. Based on SME Tool Engineering Handbook.

cuttingspeed.label: Cutting Speed
cuttingspeed.helper: Actual cutting speed usado. Must be within recommended range for Material/tool combination. Reference: ISO 3685.

tooldiameter.label: Tool Diámetro
tooldiameter.helper: Diámetro of cutting tool (for milling/drilling). Affects spindle speed calculation. Reference: ISO 3002.

spindlespeed.label: Spindle Speed
spindlespeed.helper: Rotational speed of spindle. Calculated from cutting speed and Diámetro. Reference: ISO 230.

feedrate.label: Feed Tasa
feedrate.helper: Feed por revolution. Affects surface finish and tool life. Reference: ISO 3685.

depthofcut.label: Profundidad of Cut
depthofcut.helper: Radial or axial Profundidad. Influences cutting forces and Potencia. Reference: ISO 3002.

toollife.label: Tool Life
toollife.helper: Expected tool life before replacement. usado for Costo analysis. Reference: Taylor's tool life equation.

machinepower.label: Machine Potencia
machinepower.helper: Available spindle Potencia. Must exceed required cutting Potencia. Reference: ISO 3002.

dataconfidence.label: Data Confidence
dataconfidence.helper: Confidence level in input data. Adjusts output reliability. Common in risk analysis.

cuttingspeed.label: Cutting Speed (Vc)
cuttingspeed.helper: ISO 3685:1993 - Tool-life testing with single-point turning tools. Cutting speed is the relative velocity between the tool and workpiece, affecting tool life and surface finish.

spindlespeed.label: Spindle Speed (n)
spindlespeed.helper: Calculated from cutting speed and workpiece Diámetro. Standard machining practice por ISO 3002-1.

numberofteeth.label: Number of Dientes (z)
numberofteeth.helper: Number of cutting edges on the tool. Common for milling cutters; affects feed por tooth.

feedpertooth.label: Feed por Tooth (fz)
feedpertooth.helper: ISO 3002-1:1982 - Basic quantities in cutting and grinding. DePlazoines chip load and surface finish.

materialtype.label: Material Type
materialtype.helper: Material proporties affect recommended cutting parameters. Based on Machining Data Handbook (Metcut) and ISO 513.

operationtype.label: Oporation Type
operationtype.helper: Diffealquiler oporations have distinct Feed Tasa formulas. Standard machining practice.

batchsize.label: Batch Size (units)
batchsize.helper: Total number of units started in the batch. Based on production planning standards (APICS).

goodunits.label: Unidades buenas Output
goodunits.helper: Units meeting quality specifications. ISO 9001 quality metrics.

reworkunits.label: Rework Units
reworkunits.helper: Units that can be reworked to meet specs. Lean Six Sigma DMAIC.

scrapunits.label: Scrap Units
scrapunits.helper: Units that are scrapped. Despordicio reduction metrics (Lean).

costperunit.label: Costoo por unit ($)
costperunit.helper: Standard Costoo por unit including Materials and labor. Managerial accounting.

reworkcostperunit.label: Rework Costoo por unit ($)
reworkcostperunit.helper: Additional Costo to rework a unit. Costo of quality (COQ) analysis.

sellingpriceperunit.label: Selling Precio por unit ($)
sellingpriceperunit.helper: Revenue por good unit sold. Pricing stTasagy.

dataconfidence.label: Data Confidence Level
dataconfidence.helper: Subjective confidence in input data accuracy. usado for risk adjustment.

powerconsumption.label: Potencia Consumo
powerconsumption.helper: Average Potencia Consumo of equipment in kilowatts. Based on ISO 50001 Energía management standards.

operatinghours.label: Oporating Horas
operatinghours.helper: Total oporating Horas por billing poriod. Typically monthly or annually.

electricityrate.label: Electricity Tasa
electricityrate.helper: Costo por kilowatt-hour from utility bill. Varies by region and tariff.

demandcharge.label: Demand Charge
demandcharge.helper: Peak demand charge por kW. Common in industrial tariffs.

peakdemand.label: Peak Demand
peakdemand.helper: Maximum Potencia demand during billing poriod. usado for demand charge calculation.

timeperiod.label: Time poriod
timeperiod.helper: Billing poriod for Costo calculation. Common in utility billing cycles.

dataconfidence.label: Data Confidence
dataconfidence.helper: Confidence level in input data. usado for risk-adjusted Costo estimates.

monthlyconsumption.label: Monthly Consumo
monthlyconsumption.helper: Total electricity Consumo por month in kilowatt-Horas. Based on utility billing data.

tariffrate.label: Tariff Tasa
tariffrate.helper: Precio por kWh charged by utility. Varies by region and provider.

peakconsumption.label: Peak Consumo
peakconsumption.helper: Consumo during peak Horas if time-of-use pricing applies.

taxrate.label: Tax Tasa
taxrate.helper: Applicable tax porcentage on Factura eléctrica.

dataconfidence.label: Data Confidence
dataconfidence.helper: Confidence level in input data accuracy.

energyconsumed.label: Energía Consumed
energyconsumed.helper: Total Energía consumed in kilowatt-Horas over the measurement poriod. Based on ISO 50001 Energía management standard.

productionoutput.label: Production Output
productionoutput.helper: Total units produced in the same poriod. usado to calculate Energía intensity por unit.

operatinghours.label: Oporating Horas
operatinghours.helper: Total oporating Horas of the facility or equipment during the measurement poriod.

energycostperkwh.label: Energía Costoo por kWh
energycostperkwh.helper: Average Costo of Energía por kilowatt-hour. usado to calculate total Energía Costoo.

baselineenergyintensity.label: Baseline Energía Intensity
baselineenergyintensity.helper: Industry benchmark or historical baseline Energía intensity for comparison. Based on ISO 50001 Energía Rendimiento indicators.

dataconfidence.label: Data Confidence Level
dataconfidence.helper: Confidence in the accuracy of input data. Affects adjustment of results. Low confidence reduces reliability.

activitytype.label: Activity Type
activitytype.helper: ISO 14064-1:2018 greenhouse gas accounting; EPA emission factors.

quantity.label: Cantidad
quantity.helper: Amount of activity (e.g., kWh for electricity, gallons for Combustible, miles for travel).

unit.label: Unit
unit.helper: Unit matching the activity type; conversion factors from IPCC guidelines.

emissionfactor.label: Emission Factor (kg CO2e por unit)
emissionfactor.placeholder: Introduzca emission factor (kg co2e por unit)
emissionfactor.helper: Default factors from EPA eGRID or DEFRA; user can override for specific region.

dataconfidence.label: Data Confidence
dataconfidence.helper: Uncertainty adjustment por ISO 14064-3:2019; low confidence increases uncertainty margin.

includeoffset.label: Include Offsets
includeoffset.helper: If true, subtract purchased offsets from total emissions.

fueltype.label: Combustible Type
fueltype.helper: Combustible type dePlazoines emission factors por ISO 14064 and IPCC guidelines.

fuelconsumption.label: Combustible Consumo
fuelconsumption.helper: Total Combustible consumed in liters. Source: oporational records.

emissionfactor.label: Emission Factor
emissionfactor.helper: CO2 equivalent por liter. Default for diesel por IPCC 2006. For other Combustibles, user can override.

operatinghours.label: Oporating Horas
operatinghours.helper: Horas of oporation por day. usado for time-based calculations.

daysperyear.label: Días por Year
daysperyear.helper: Annual oporating Días. Standard industrial assumption.

dataconfidence.label: Data Confidence
dataconfidence.helper: Confidence level in input data. Affects adjustment factor por ISO 14064 uncertainty guidance.

panelcapacity.label: Panel Capacity (STC)
panelcapacity.helper: Standard Test Condition (STC) rating por panel. Based on IEC 61215 standard.

irradiance.label: Average Daily Irradiance
irradiance.helper: Peak Sun Horas (PSH) based on location. Source: NASA SSE or NREL PVWatts.

systemlosses.label: System Losses
systemlosses.helper: Includes wiring, inverter, temporature, shading, soiling, etc. Typical range 10-20% por NREL.

degradationrate.label: Annual Degradation Tasa
degradationrate.helper: Typical 0.5-1% por year por manufacturer warranty. Based on IEC 61215.

systemcost.label: Total System Costo
systemcost.helper: Total installed Costo after incentives. usado for ROI calculation.

inverterefficiency.label: Inverter Efficiency
inverterefficiency.helper: Typical 95-98% for modern inverters. Based on IEC 61683.

tiltangle.label: Tilt Angle
tiltangle.helper: Panel tilt from horizontal. Optimal = latitude. Source: ASHRAE.

azimuthangle.label: Azimuth Angle
azimuthangle.helper: Direction panel faces: 0=N, 90=E, 180=S, 270=W. Optimal south in northern hemisphere.

ambienttemperature.label: Average Ambient Temporature
ambienttemperature.helper: Average daytime temporature during peak Sun Horas.

dataconfidence.label: Data Confidence Level
dataconfidence.helper: Adjusts output for uncertainty. Low = 0.8, Medium = 1.0, High = 1.1 multiplier.

surfacearea.label: Surface Área
surfacearea.helper: Total Surface Área of the object/pipe exposed to ambient. Based on ISO 12241:2008 for thermal insulation.

surfacetemperature.label: Surface Temporature
surfacetemperature.helper: Temporature of the outer surface of the insulation or object. Required for convective and radiative Pérdida de calor calculation.

ambienttemperature.label: Ambient Temporature
ambienttemperature.helper: Temporature of surrounding air. Standard ambient conditions por ISO 6946.

windspeed.label: Wind Speed
windspeed.helper: Air velocity over surface. Affects convective heat transfer coefficient. Based on ASHRAE Handbook.

emissivity.label: Emissivity
emissivity.helper: Surface emissivity for radiative heat transfer. Typical Valors: oxidized steel 0.8, polished metal 0.1. Based on ASTM C1371.

insulationthickness.label: Insulation Espesor
insulationthickness.helper: Espesor of insulation layer. usado to compute thermal resistance. Based on ISO 12241.

insulationconductivity.label: Insulation Thermal Conductivity
insulationconductivity.helper: Thermal conductivity of insulation Material. Typical: mineral wool 0.04, polyurethane 0.025. Based on ASTM C518.

operationhours.label: Oporation Horas por Year
operationhours.helper: Annual oporating Horas. usado to calculate annual Energía loss. Standard industrial assumption.

energycost.label: Energía Costoo
energycost.helper: Costo of Energía por kWh. usado to calculate financial loss. Based on local utility Tasas.

fueltype.label: Combustible Type
fueltype.helper: Combustible type dePlazoines heating Valor And combustion characteristics. Based on ASME PTC 4 and ISO 50001.

fuelconsumption.label: Combustible Consumo
fuelconsumption.helper: Mass or Volumentric Flujo Tasa of Combustible input. Essential for Energía balance.

fuelheatingvalue.label: Combustible Heating Valor (HHV)
fuelheatingvalue.helper: Higher Heating Valor of Combustible. Standard test methods ASTM D240 for liquids, ASTM D5865 for solids.

steamflow.label: Steam Flujo Tasa
steamflow.helper: Mass Flujo Tasa of steam produced. Key output parameter.

steamenthalpy.label: Steam Enthalpy
steamenthalpy.helper: Enthalpy of steam at oporating Presión and temporature. From steam tables por ASME.

feedwaterenthalpy.label: Feedwater Enthalpy
feedwaterenthalpy.helper: Enthalpy of feedwater entering boiler. Typically at deaerator outlet temporature.

excessair.label: Excess Air porcentage
excessair.helper: Excess air usado for combustion. Affects flue gas losses. Typical range 10-50%.

fluegastemperature.label: Flue Gas Exit Temporature
fluegastemperature.helper: Temporature of flue gases leaving boiler. Higher temporature increases losses.

ambienttemperature.label: Ambient Temporature
ambienttemperature.helper: Reference ambient temporature for Pérdida de calor calculations.

radiationloss.label: Radiation and Convection Loss
radiationloss.helper: Pérdida de calor from boiler surface. Typically 1-3% of input Energía.

blowdownrate.label: Blowdown Tasa
blowdownrate.helper: porcentage of boiler water discharged to control solids. Affects efficiency.

dataconfidence.label: Data Confidence Level
dataconfidence.helper: User's confidence in input data accuracy. Adjusts output reliability.

compressorpower.label: Compressor Potencia
compressorpower.helper: Nominal Potencia rating of the compressor motor. Based on ISO 1217 standard for compressor Rendimiento testing.

loadfactor.label: Factor de carga
loadfactor.helper: porcentage of time the compressor opeTasas at full load. Typical Valors from compressed air system audits (ISO 11011).

operatinghoursperday.label: Oporating Horas por Day
operatinghoursperday.helper: Daily oporating Horas. Based on shift patterns and production schedules.

operatingdaysperyear.label: Oporating Días por Year
operatingdaysperyear.helper: Annual oporating Días. Typical for industrial facilities.

electricitycost.label: Electricity Costoo
electricitycost.helper: Average electricity Precio. Based on local utility Tasas or EIA data.

motorefficiency.label: Motor Efficiency
motorefficiency.helper: Efficiency of the electric motor. Based on NEMA MG1 or IEC 60034 standards.

compressortype.label: Compressor Type
compressortype.helper: Type of compressor affects maintenance and efficiency factors. Based on ISO 5390 classification.

maintenancefactor.label: Maintenance Factor
maintenancefactor.helper: Additional Energía loss due to poor maintenance (e.g., leaks, dirty filters). Based on DOE compressed air guidelines.

dataconfidence.label: Data Confidence
dataconfidence.helper: Confidence level in input data accuracy. usado for risk-adjusted outputs.

sector.label: Sector
sector.helper: CBAM sectors as defined in EU Regulation 2023/956. Select the sector of the product.

productionvolume.label: Annual Production Volumen
productionvolume.helper: Total annual production Volumen of the product in tonnes. Required for calculating embedded emissions.

embeddedemissionsperton.label: Embedded Emissions por Tonne
embeddedemissionsperton.helper: Direct and indirect greenhouse gas emissions embedded in one tonne of product, measured in tonnes of CO2 equivalent. Based on ISO 14064 and GHG Protocol.

carbonpriceorigin.label: Precio del carbono in Origin Country
carbonpriceorigin.placeholder: Introduzca precio del carbono in origin country
carbonpriceorigin.helper: Corriente Precio del carbono applicable in the country of origin. If no Precio del carbono, enter 0. Based on World Bank Carbon Pricing Dashboard.

cbamcertificateprice.label: CBAM Certificate Precio (EU ETS)
cbamcertificateprice.helper: Corriente Precio of CBAM certificates, linked to EU ETS allowance Precio. Source: European Energía Exchange (EEX).

freeallowancefactor.label: Free Allowance Factor
freeallowancefactor.helper: porcentage of emissions covered by free allowances during the transitional poriod. Default 0% for full exposure. Based on CBAM regulation.

dataconfidence.label: Data Confidence Level
dataconfidence.helper: Confidence level in the input data. Low: estimated, Medium: industry average, High: verified. Affects confidence adjustment.

distance.label: Distancia Traveled
distance.helper: Total Distancia traveled by the vehicle. Based on standard odometer readings.

fuelused.label: Combustible usado
fuelused.helper: Volumen of Combustible consumed during the trip. Measured at pump.

fueltype.label: Combustible Type
fueltype.helper: Type of Combustible usado. Affects Energía Densidad and CO2 emission factors. Reference: ISO 14064.

vehicletype.label: Vehicle Type
vehicletype.helper: Vehicle category for benchmarking. Reference: EPA Combustible economy standards.

drivingcondition.label: Driving Condition
drivingcondition.helper: Driving pattern affects Combustible efficiency. City driving has lower efficiency due to stops.

loadfactor.label: Factor de carga
loadfactor.helper: porcentage of maximum load capacity. Higher load increases Combustible Consumo. Reference: ISO 50001.

maintenancescore.label: Maintenance Score
maintenancescore.helper: Vehicle maintenance condition (0=poor, 100=excellent). Poor maintenance increases Combustible use. Reference: Lean TPM.

dataconfidence.label: Data Confidence
dataconfidence.helper: Confidence in input data accuracy. usado to adjust output reliability.

scalefactor.label: Scale Factor (e.g., por 100)
scalefactor.helper: Multiplier to express proportion as a porcentage (scale=100) or por mille (scale=1000). Default 1 gives raw ratio. Common in quality metrics (defects por million opportunities).

dataconfidence.label: Data Confidence Level
dataconfidence.helper: Subjective confidence in input data quality. usado to adjust output reliability. Based on data quality management principles (ISO 8000).

eventaprobability.label: Probability of Event A
eventaprobability.helper: Base probability of event A occurring. usado in basic probability calculations. Referenced from probability theory fundamentals.

eventbprobability.label: Probability of Event B
eventbprobability.helper: Base probability of event B occurring. usado in joint and conditional probability calculations.

conditionalprobability.label: Conditional Probability P(B|A)
conditionalprobability.helper: Probability of B given A. Required for Bayes' theorem and conditional probability analysis.

calculationmode.label: Calculation Mode
calculationmode.helper: Select the type of probability calculation: joint (P(A∩B)), conditional (P(A|B)), Bayes (P(A|B) from P(B|A)), complement (P(not A)), union (P(A∪B)).

dataconfidence.label: Data Confidence Level
dataconfidence.helper: Confidence level in input data (0 to 1). usado to adjust output for uncertainty. Typical Valors: 0.9, 0.95, 0.99.

populationsize.label: Population Size
populationsize.helper: Total number of items or individuals in the population. Required for finite population correction. Based on statistical sampling standards (ISO 2859, ANSI/ASQ Z1.4).

confidencelevel.label: Confidence Level
confidencelevel.helper: Desired probability that the sample accuTasaly represents the population. Common choices: 90%, 95%, 99%. Based on Six Sigma and hypothesis testing standards.

marginoferror.label: Margin of Error
marginoferror.helper: Maximum acceptable diferencia between sample statistic and population parameter. Typically 5% for general surveys. Based on survey methodology (Cochran, 1977).

expectedproportion.label: Expected Proportion
expectedproportion.helper: Anticipated proportion of the population with the attribute of interest. Use 50% for maximum variability. Based on sample size formulas (Cochran, 1977).

dataconfidence.label: Data Confidence
dataconfidence.helper: Confidence in the input data quality (e.g., from historical data). Adjusts final sample size upward if data confidence is low. Based on risk management practices.

value.label: Longitud Valor
value.helper: Input Longitud Valor to be converted. Based on SI standard (ISO 80000-3).

fromunit.label: Unidad origen
fromunit.helper: Source unit of Longitud. Supports SI and imporial units por ISO 80000-3 and ASTM E380.

tounit.label: To Unit
tounit.helper: Objetivo unit of Longitud. Supports SI and imporial units por ISO 80000-3 and ASTM E380.

value.label: Valor
value.helper: The numeric Valor of the Área to be converted. Based on SI unit standard (ISO 80000-3).

fromunit.label: Unidad origen
fromunit.helper: The unit of the input Área. Common units based on international standards (ISO 80000-3) and US customary units.

tounit.label: To Unit
tounit.helper: The Objetivo unit for conversion. Same standards as fromUnit.

powerfactor.label: Güç Faktörü (cos φ)
powerfactor.helper: AC devrelerde aktif gücün görünür güce oranı. IEEE 1459 standardına göre tanımlanır. Endüstriyel tesislerde tipik 0.8-0.95 arası.

current.label: Akım (Ampor)
current.helper: Elektrik akımı değeri, ampormetre ile ölçülür. IEC 60038 standardına göre nominal akım değerleri.

voltage.label: Gerilim (Volt)
voltage.helper: Faz-nötr veya faz-faz gerilimi. IEC 60038 standart gerilim seviyeleri (230V, 400V, 690V vb.).

phasetype.label: Faz Türü
phasetype.helper: Tek faz veya üç faz sistemi. IEC 60364 tesisat standardına göre seçim.

efficiency.label: Verim (%)
efficiency.helper: Motor, jeneratör veya dönüştürücü verimi. IEC 60034-2 motor verim standardı.

odahacmi.label: Oda Hacmi (m³)
odahacmi.helper: Odanın genişlik, uzunluk ve yükseklik çarpımı. Standart: ASHRAE Handbook - HVAC Systems and Equipment.

kisisayisi.label: Kişi Sayısı
kisisayisi.helper: Odada bulunan ortalama kişi sayısı. Her kişi yaklaşık 100-150 W ısı yükü ekler. Kaynak: ASHRAE.

pencerealani.label: Pencere Alanı (m²)
pencerealani.helper: Güneş ışınımından kaynaklı ısı kazancı için. Standart: ASHRAE Solar Heat Gain Coefficients.

pencereyonu.label: Pencere Yönü
pencereyonu.helper: Güneş ışınımı faktörü yöne göre değişir. Kaynak: ASHRAE.

yalitimseviyesi.label: Yalıtım Seviyesi
yalitimseviyesi.helper: Binanın yalıtım kalitesi. Zayıf: yüksek ısı transferi, İyi: düşük. Standart: TS 825 (Türkiye) veya ISO 6946.

cihazgucu.label: Elektrikli Cihaz Gücü (W)
cihazgucu.helper: Odadaki bilgisayar, TV vb. cihazların toplam gücü. Kaynak: ASHRAE.

aydinlatmagucu.label: Aydınlatma Gücü (W)
aydinlatmagucu.helper: Aydınlatma armatürlerinin toplam gücü. Kaynak: ASHRAE.

dataconfidence.label: Veri Güveni (0-1)
dataconfidence.helper: Girdi verilerinin güvenilirliği. 1: yüksek güven, 0: düşük. Premium özellikler için kullanılır.

civatacapi.label: Cıvata Çapı (mm)
civatacapi.helper: Cıvatanın nominal çapı. ISO 898-1 standardına göre mekanik özellikler çapa bağlıdır.

adim.label: Adım (mm)
adim.helper: Diş adımı. Metrik dişler için standart değerler ISO 261'e göre belirlenir.

surtunmekatsayisi.label: Sürtünme Katsayısı
surtunmekatsayisi.helper: Diş ve oturma yüzeyi sürtünme katsayısı. VDI 2230 standardına göre tipik değerler 0.08-0.20 arasıdır.

onyuklemekuvveti.label: Ön Yükleme Kuvveti (kN)
onyuklemekuvveti.helper: Cıvataya uygulanması istenen eksenel ön yükleme kuvveti. Tasarım gereksinimine göre belirlenir.

malzemesinifi.label: Malzeme Sınıfı
malzemesinifi.helper: Cıvata malzeme sınıfı. ISO 898-1'e göre mekanik özellikleri belirler. Akma dayanımı ve çekme dayanımı sınıfa bağlıdır.

yaglamali.label: Yağlamalı Montaj
yaglamali.helper: Montaj sırasında yağlama yapılıp yapılmadığı. Yağlama sürtünme katsayısını düşürür ve tork değerini etkiler.

vehicletype.label: Araç Türü
vehicletype.helper: Türkiye'de MTV hesaplamasında araç türü belirleyicidir. 197 sayılı Motorlu Taşıtlar Vergisi Kanunu'na göre sınıflandırma yapılır.

enginedisplacement.label: Motor Silindir Hacmi (cm³)
enginedisplacement.helper: Motor hacmi MTV dilimlerini belirler. 197 sayılı Kanun'da yer alan tarifeye göre 1300, 1600, 1800, 2000, 2500, 3000, 4000 cm³ eşik değerleri kullanılır.

vehicleage.label: Araç Yaşı (yıl)
vehicleage.helper: Araç yaşı arttıkça MTV oranı düşer. Kanun'da 1-3, 4-6, 7-11, 12-15, 16+ yaş dilimleri tanımlanmıştır.

ishybridorelectric.label: Hibrit/Elektrikli Araç
ishybridorelectric.helper: Elektrikli ve bazı hibrit araçlar için MTV indirimi veya muafiyeti uygulanır. 197 sayılı Kanun ve çevre dostu araç teşvikleri kapsamında değerlendirilir.

taxyear.label: Vergi Yılı
taxyear.helper: Her yıl yeniden değerleme oranında güncellenen MTV tutarları için yıl bilgisi gereklidir. Hazine ve Maliye Bakanlığı tarafından yayımlanan tarifeler kullanılır.

value.label: Basınç Değeri
value.helper: Kullanıcının dönüştürmek istediği basınç değeri. Endüstriyel uygulamalarda yaygın olarak kullanılan birimlerden biridir. ISO 80000-4:2006 standardına dayanır.

fromunit.label: Kaynak Birim
fromunit.helper: Dönüştürülecek basınç birimi. Mühendislikte yaygın kullanılan birimler: bar (metrik), psi (İngiliz sistemi), pascal (SI).

horsepower.label: Beygir Gücü (HP)
horsepower.helper: Güç değeri, genellikle motor veya türbin gibi makinelerin porformansını ifade eder. Endüstriyel standartlarda (ISO 80000-4) kullanılır.

horsepowertype.label: Beygir Gücü Türü
horsepowertype.helper: Farklı tanımlar (mekanik, metrik, elektrik, kazan) farklı dönüşüm katsayıları gerektirir. ISO 80000-4 ve IEEE standartlarına dayanır.

profiltipi.label: Profil Tipi
profiltipi.helper: NPU ve NPI profilleri farklı geometrik özelliklere sahiptir. Standart: DIN 1026-1 (NPU) ve DIN 1026-2 (NPI).

profilboyutu.label: Profil Boyutu (mm)
profilboyutu.helper: Profilin nominal yüksekliği (h). Standart boyutlar DIN 1026'ya göre belirlenmiştir.

profilkalitesi.label: Profil Kalitesi (Çelik Sınıfı)
profilkalitesi.helper: Çelik sınıfı, yoğunluğu ve mekanik özellikleri etkiler. Standart: EN 10025-2.

profiluzunlugu.label: Profil Uzunluğu (m)
profiluzunlugu.helper: Standart profil boyu genellikle 6 m veya 12 m'dir. Müşteri talebine göre değişebilir.

dataconfidence.label: Veri Güvenilirliği
dataconfidence.helper: Kullanılan verilerin güvenilirlik seviyesi. Düşük güvenilirlikte sonuçlar bir güvenlik faktörü ile çarpılır.

length.label: Boy (m)
length.helper: Profilin metre cinsinden boyu. Standart boylar genellikle 6 m veya 12 m'dir.

profiletype.label: Profil Tipi
profiletype.helper: Köşebent lama profilleri genellikle eşit veya eşit olmayan kollu olarak üretilir. TS 914 EN 10056-1 standardına göre sınıflandırılır.

widtha.label: Genişlik A (mm)
widtha.helper: Köşebentin birinci kenar genişliği. TS 914 EN 10056-1'e göre standart ölçüler 20-250 mm arasındadır.

widthb.label: Genişlik B (mm)
widthb.helper: Köşebentin ikinci kenar genişliği. Eşit kollu profillerde AnchoA ile aynı, eşit olmayan kolluda farklı olabilir.

thickness.label: Et Kalınlığı (mm)
thickness.helper: Köşebent lama et kalınlığı. TS 914 EN 10056-1'e göre 3-25 mm arası standart kalınlıklar.

materialdensity.label: Malzeme Yoğunluğu (kg/m³)
materialdensity.helper: Çelik için tipik yoğunluk 7850 kg/m³. Paslanmaz çelik veya alüminyum gibi farklı malzemeler için değişir. ISO 630-1 referans alınır.

quantity.label: Adet
quantity.helper: Hesaplanacak profil adedi. Toplam ağırlık için adet ile çarpılır.

discap.label: Dış Çap (mm)
discap.helper: Boru dış çapı, standart boru boyutlarına göre (ISO 4200, ASTM A53) belirlenir.

etkal.label: Et Kalınlığı (mm)
etkal.helper: Boru cidar kalınlığı, basınç sınıfına ve standarda (ASME B36.10, EN 10255) göre seçilir.

boy.label: Boru Boyu (m)
boy.helper: Standart boru boyları genellikle 6 m veya 12 m'dir (ISO 4200).

malzeme.label: Malzeme Türü
malzeme.helper: Çelik (yoğunluk 7850 kg/m³) veya paslanmaz çelik (yoğunluk 7930 kg/m³) seçimi, ağırlık hesaplamasında kullanılır.

powerkw.label: Güç (kW)
powerkw.helper: Motor gücü kilowatt cinsinden. ISO 80000-4 standardına göre SI birimi.

powerhp.label: Güç (HP)
powerhp.helper: Motor gücü beygir gücü cinsinden. Metrik HP (PS) kullanılır; 1 HP = 0.7355 kW (metrik).

conversiontype.label: Dönüşüm Yönü
conversiontype.helper: Dönüşüm yönü seçimi: kW'tan HP'ye veya HP'den kW'a.

toplamgucihtiyaci.label: Toplam Güç İhtiyacı (kVA)
toplamgucihtiyaci.helper: Toplam yükün başlangıç ve çalışma anındaki güç ihtiyacı. ISO 8528 standardına göre jeneratör kapasitesi belirlenir.

yedeklilikfaktoru.label: Yedeklilik Faktörü
yedeklilikfaktoru.helper: Kritik yükler için yedek kapasite oranı. Genellikle 1.1-1.3 arası, kritik tesislerde 1.5-2.0.

calismasuresigunluk.label: Günlük Çalışma Süresi (saat)
calismasuresigunluk.helper: Jeneratörün günlük ortalama çalışma süresi. Sürekli çalışma için 24 saat.

calismagunuaylik.label: Aylık Çalışma Günü
calismagunuaylik.helper: Aylık ortalama çalışma günü sayısı. Vardiya düzenine göre değişir.

yakittuketimorani.label: Yakıt Tüketim Oranı (L/kWh)
yakittuketimorani.helper: Jeneratörün ürettiği her kWh başına tükettiği yakıt miktarı. Dizel jeneratörlerde tipik 0.2-0.4 L/kWh.

yakitfiyati.label: Yakıt Fiyatı (TL/L)
yakitfiyati.helper: Güncel yakıt fiyatı. EPDK verileri baz alınabilir.

jeneratortipi.label: Jeneratör Tipi
jeneratortipi.helper: Jeneratörün yakıt türü. Dizel en yaygın, gaz daha temiz, benzin daha az verimli.

bakimmaliyetiyillik.label: Yıllık Bakım Maliyeti (TL)
bakimmaliyetiyillik.helper: Jeneratörün yıllık poriyodik bakım maliyeti. Üretici önerileri ve işletme koşullarına göre değişir.

yatirimmaliyeti.label: Yatırım Maliyeti (TL)
yatirimmaliyeti.helper: Jeneratörün satın alma ve kurulum maliyeti. Piyasa araştırması ile belirlenir.

ekonomikomur.label: Ekonomik Ömür (yıl)
ekonomikomur.helper: Jeneratörün ekonomik ömrü. Genellikle 10-20 yıl arası.

iskontoorani.label: İskonto Oranı (%)
iskontoorani.helper: Sermaye maliyeti veya alternatif yatırım getirisi. Finansal analizlerde kullanılır.

dataconfidence.label: Veri Güveni
dataconfidence.helper: Girdi verilerinin güvenilirlik seviyesi. Düşük ise sonuçlar daha muhafazakar hesaplanır.

akim.label: Akım (A)
akim.helper: Devreden geçen akım değeri. IEC 60364 standardına göre kablo kesiti seçiminde temel parametre.

gerilim.label: Gerilim (V)
gerilim.helper: Sistem gerilimi. Alçak gerilim (230/400V) veya orta gerilim için kullanılır.

kablouzunlugu.label: Kablo Uzunluğu (m)
kablouzunlugu.helper: Kablo mesafesi. Gerilim düşümü hesabı için gereklidir.

kablotipi.label: Kablo Tipi
kablotipi.helper: Yalıtım malzemesi. IEC 60502 standardına göre farklı sıcaklık dayanımları.

tesisatsekli.label: Tesisat Şekli
tesisatsekli.helper: Kablo döşeme şekli. Isı dağılımını etkiler, IEC 60364-5-52.

ortamsicakligi.label: Ortam Sıcaklığı (°C)
ortamsicakligi.helper: Ortam sıcaklığı. Kablo taşıma kapasitesini düzeltmek için kullanılır.

izinligerilimdusumu.label: İzinli Gerilim Düşümü (%)
izinligerilimdusumu.helper: Maksimum izin verilen gerilim düşümü. IEC 60364 standardına göre genelde %3-5.

fazsayisi.label: Faz Sayısı
fazsayisi.helper: Tek faz veya üç faz sistemi. Gerilim düşümü formülünü etkiler.

tuketimmiktari.label: Aylık Doğalgaz Tüketimi
tuketimmiktari.helper: Fatura veya sayaç okumasından alınan aylık tüketim miktarı. ISO 50001 enerji yöNetoimi standardı kapsamında temel girdi.

birimfiyat.label: Birim Doğalgaz Fiyatı
birimfiyat.helper: Enerji Piyasası Düzenleme Kurumu (EPDK) tarafından belirlenen veya tedarikçi sözleşmesindeki birim fiyat.

isitmagunsayisi.label: Isıtma Sezonu Gün Sayısı
isitmagunsayisi.helper: Binanın ısıtma ihtiyacı olan gün sayısı. TS 825 standardına göre derece-gün hesabında kullanılır.

binaisikaybi.label: Bina Isı Kaybı Katsayısı
binaisikaybi.helper: Binanın yalıtım seviyesini gösteren katsayı. TS 825 ve ISO 6946 standartlarına göre hesaplanır.

verimlilik.label: Kazan Verimliliği
verimlilik.helper: Doğalgaz kazanının yıllık ortalama verimi. Yoğuşmalı kazanlar için %90-98, konvansiyonel için %80-90.

dataconfidence.label: Veri Güvenilirliği
dataconfidence.helper: Girdi verilerinin kaynağına göre güvenilirlik seviyesi. Düşük: tahmini, Orta: fatura bazlı, Yüksek: otomatik sayaç okuma.

benzinfiyat.label: Benzin Fiyatı (TL/Litre)
benzinfiyat.helper: Güncel benzin pompa fiyatı. EPDK verileri baz alınır.

lpgfiyat.label: LPG Fiyatı (TL/Litre)
lpgfiyat.helper: Güncel LPG pompa fiyatı. EPDK verileri baz alınır.

benzintuketim.label: Benzin Tüketimi (L/100 km)
benzintuketim.helper: Aracın benzinle 100 km'de tükettiği litre. Araç teknik verisi.

lpgtuketim.label: LPG Tüketimi (L/100 km)
lpgtuketim.helper: Aracın LPG ile 100 km'de tükettiği litre. Genellikle benzinden %20-30 fazla.

yillikkm.label: Yıllık Kullanım (km)
yillikkm.helper: Aracın yıllık ortalama kilometresi. Sürüş alışkanlığına göre.

lpgdonusummaliyeti.label: LPG Dönüşüm Maliyeti (TL)
lpgdonusummaliyeti.helper: LPG kiti montaj ücreti. Piyasa araştırması.

lpgbakimfarki.label: Yıllık LPG Bakım Farkı (TL)
lpgbakimfarki.helper: LPG'li araçların ek bakım maliyeti (subap, filtre vb.).

yillikkm.label: Yıllık Kullanım (km)
yillikkm.helper: Kullanıcının yıllık ortalama sürüş mesafesi. Sektörel standart: TÜİK ulaşım istatistikleri.

dizelyakittuketimi.label: Dizel Yakıt Tüketimi (L/100km)
dizelyakittuketimi.helper: Dizel aracın 100 km'de tükettiği litre cinsinden yakıt. Üretici verileri veya WLTP normu.

benzinyakittuketimi.label: Benzin Yakıt Tüketimi (L/100km)
benzinyakittuketimi.helper: Benzinli aracın 100 km'de tükettiği litre cinsinden yakıt. Üretici verileri veya WLTP normu.

dizelfiyat.label: Dizel Fiyatı (TL/L)
dizelfiyat.helper: Güncel dizel litre fiyatı. EPDK verileri.

benzinfiyat.label: Benzin Fiyatı (TL/L)
benzinfiyat.helper: Güncel benzin litre fiyatı. EPDK verileri.

dizelbakimmaliyeti.label: Dizel Yıllık Bakım Maliyeti (TL)
dizelbakimmaliyeti.helper: Dizel aracın yıllık poriyodik bakım maliyeti. Yetkili servis ortalama fiyatları.

benzinbakimmaliyeti.label: Benzin Yıllık Bakım Maliyeti (TL)
benzinbakimmaliyeti.helper: Benzinli aracın yıllık poriyodik bakım maliyeti. Yetkili servis ortalama fiyatları.

dizelvergi.label: Dizel Yıllık MTV (TL)
dizelvergi.helper: Dizel araç için yıllık motorlu taşıtlar vergisi. Gelir İdaresi Başkanlığı tarifesi.

benzinvergi.label: Benzin Yıllık MTV (TL)
benzinvergi.helper: Benzinli araç için yıllık motorlu taşıtlar vergisi. Gelir İdaresi Başkanlığı tarifesi.

dizelsigorta.label: Dizel Yıllık Sigorta (TL)
dizelsigorta.helper: Dizel araç için yıllık zorunlu trafik sigortası ve kasko. Sektör ortalaması.

benzinsigorta.label: Benzin Yıllık Sigorta (TL)
benzinsigorta.helper: Benzinli araç için yıllık zorunlu trafik sigortası ve kasko. Sektör ortalaması.

dizeldegerkaybi.label: Dizel Yıllık Değer Kaybı (TL)
dizeldegerkaybi.helper: Dizel aracın yıllık amortismanı. İkinci el piyasa verileri.

benzindegerkaybi.label: Benzin Yıllık Değer Kaybı (TL)
benzindegerkaybi.helper: Benzinli aracın yıllık amortismanı. İkinci el piyasa verileri.

coveragerate.label: Kaplama Oranı (m²/L)
coveragerate.helper: Üretici tarafından belirtilen teorik kaplama oranı. ISO 12944 standardına göre boya sarfiyatı hesaplamalarında kullanılır.

surfacearea.label: Yüzey Alanı (m²)
surfacearea.helper: Kaplanacak toplam yüzey alanı. Proje spesifikasyonlarından alınır.

numberofcoats.label: Kat Sayısı
numberofcoats.helper: Uygulanacak boya katı sayısı. Genellikle 1-3 arası, özel durumlarda daha fazla.

wastefactor.label: Atık Faktörü (%)
wastefactor.helper: Uygulama sırasında oluşan kayıplar (püskürtme, sıçrama, fırça/ rulo kaybı). Endüstriyel uygulamalarda %5-20 arası.

applicationmethod.label: Uygulama Yöntemi
applicationmethod.helper: Uygulama yöntemi atık faktörünü etkiler. Püskürtme daha yüksek atık, fırça daha düşük.

paintdensity.label: Boya Yoğunluğu (kg/L)
paintdensity.helper: Boya yoğunluğu, ağırlık bazlı hesaplamalar için gerekli. Üretici teknik veri sayfasından alınır.

paintcostperliter.label: Boya Birim Maliyeti (TL/L)
paintcostperliter.helper: Boya fiyatı, piyasa koşullarına göre değişir.

laborcostperhour.label: İşçilik Maliyeti (TL/saat)
laborcostperhour.helper: İşçilik saat ücreti, oporasyonel maliyet hesaplamaları için.

laborproductivity.label: İşçilik Verimliliği (m²/saat)
laborproductivity.helper: Bir işçinin saatte kapladığı alan. Lean prensiplerine göre standart zaman ölçümü.

dataconfidence.label: Veri Güveni (%)
dataconfidence.helper: Girdi verilerinin güvenilirliği. Düşük güven, sonuçlarda düzeltme yapılmasını sağlar.

brutucret.label: Brüt Aylık Ücret (TL)
brutucret.helper: Çalışanın brüt aylık ücreti. 4857 sayılı İş Kanunu'na göre fazla mesai ücreti hesaplamasında temel girdi.

calismasaati.label: Haftalık Çalışma Saati
calismasaati.helper: Kanuni haftalık çalışma süresi (genellikle 45 saat). 4857 sayılı İş Kanunu Madde 63.

fazlamesaisaati.label: Fazla Mesai Saati (aylık)
fazlamesaisaati.helper: Aylık toplam fazla mesai saati. Kanuni sınır: yılda 270 saat (ayda ortalama 22.5 saat).

fazlamesaikatsayisi.label: Fazla Mesai Katsayısı
fazlamesaikatsayisi.helper: Fazla mesai ücreti katsayısı. Kanuni: %50 zamlı (1.5). İş sözleşmesi ile daha yüksek olabilir. 4857 sayılı İş Kanunu Madde 41.

primorani.label: Prim Oranı (%)
primorani.helper: Fazla mesaiye ek olarak ödenen prim oranı. porformansa bağlı ek ödemeler.

baseprice.label: Baz Fiyat
baseprice.helper: Sözleşme başlangıcındaki fiyat. Kaynak: Sözleşme yöNetoimi standartları.

inflationrate.label: Yıllık Enflasyon Oranı
inflationrate.helper: TÜFE veya ÜFE bazlı yıllık enflasyon oranı. Kaynak: TÜİK, IMF.

periodmonths.label: Dönem (Ay)
periodmonths.helper: Eskalasyonun uygulanacağı ay sayısı. Sözleşme süresine göre.

escalationmethod.label: Eskalasyon Yöntemi
escalationmethod.helper: Basit veya bileşik faiz yöntemi. Kaynak: Finansal mühendislik standartları.

dataconfidence.label: Veri Güveni
dataconfidence.helper: Enflasyon verisinin güvenilirlik seviyesi. Kaynak: Risk yöNetoimi.

newtonvalue.label: Newton Değeri
newtonvalue.helper: Kuvvet değeri Newton cinsinden girilir. Newton, SI birim sisteminde kuvvet birimidir. 1 N = 1 kg·m/s².

gravitationalacceleration.label: Yerçekimi İvmesi
gravitationalacceleration.helper: Standart yerçekimi ivmesi 9.80665 m/s²'dir. Farklı lokasyonlar için değişebilir. ISO 80000-4 standardına göre.

energyjoules.label: Enerji (Joule)
energyjoules.helper: Enerji miktarını joule cinsinden girin. Joule, SI birim sisteminde enerji birimidir. ISO 80000-5 standardına göre tanımlanmıştır.

energycalories.label: Enerji (Kalori)
energycalories.helper: Enerji miktarını kalori cinsinden girin. Kalori, Plazookimya ve gıda enerjisinde yaygın kullanılır. 1 cal = 4.184 J (ISO 80000-5).

energywatthours.label: Enerji (Watt-saat)
energywatthours.helper: Enerji miktarını watt-saat cinsinden girin. Watt-saat, elektrik enerjisi ölçümünde yaygındır. 1 Wh = 3600 J (ISO 80000-5).

conversiondirection.label: Dönüşüm Yönü
